title.en: The Hanhai Wind Belt is the interval between th...

content.en:
The Hanhai Wind Belt is the interval between the Hanhai boundary and other regional boundaries, enveloping the entire Hanhai boundary.

Strictly speaking, the area of the Archean Plains boundary is also part of the Hanhai boundary, but it was truncated by the truncation of Montenegro, so it is separated from the Hanhai boundary.

If you want to leave the boundary of the Hanhai area, you must cross the Hanhai wind belt.

However, the Hanhai Wind Belt was too dangerous, and even a half-step Yae Origin Ancestor would not dare to cross the Hanhai Wind Belt without permission.

However, some Yae Ancestors have built safe passages for Dao Ancestors to pass through, but they require a fee and have to apply, and not everyone can pass through.

Moreover, there are still requirements for cultivation, like a half-step sevenfold ancestor, it is impossible to let it pass through the Hanhai Wind Belt.

The Hanhai Wind Belt is very dangerous, but there are many resources inside, and many Dao Ancestors have entered the Hanhai Wind Belt to find resources suitable for themselves.

However, there are not many Dao Ancestors who have penetrated into the Hanhai Wind Belt, after all, there are many Dao Ancestors who have fallen in the Hanhai Wind Belt.

And Ye Tian learned from Xuanhuang Daozu this time that there was an extremely rare primordial artifact in an area of the Hanhai Wind Belt - the Wind Spirit!

The primordial artifact of the Wind Spirit is very small, the size of a palm, similar to the appearance of an elf, and the whole body is almost transparent.

However, the strength of the wind spirit was not weak, and the weakest wind spirit was enough to rival the peak realm of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor.

And there are many wind spirits comparable to the half-step sevenfold ancestor level, and there are also wind spirits comparable to the sevenfold origin ancestor, and even comparable to the peak level of the sevenfold origin ancestor.

What's more, in the Hanhai Wind Belt, the perception range of the Dao Ancestors is very small, and the perception range of the Wind Spirit crushes the Dao Ancestors of the same level.

So, in the Hanhai Wind Belt, you haven't discovered the wind spirit yet, and the wind spirit has discovered you.

In this way, the Dao Ancestors are in the Hanhai Wind Belt, and they want to hunt the wind spirits, which is too dangerous!

However, once you kill the Wind Spirit, you can obtain the Wind Scales in the Wind Spirit's body, which are small scales located in the center of the Wind Spirit's eyebrows.

This wind scale contains a strange power, and with the power of the Yuan Dao, it can quickly temper the body of the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor.

Among them, the Wind Scales of the Sevenfold Ancestor have the best effect.

......

Before the Hanhai Wind Belt.

Ye Tian came here, the silent black sea in front of him was white, there was no other color between heaven and earth, only white.

And at close range, you can sense the wind blowing here, this kind of wind is very special, even if the Sixfold Ancestor is blown, the flesh will be shattered, and it will fall and die in an instant.

Ye Tian did not hesitate and escaped directly into the Hanhai Wind Belt.

At this time, this special wind blew again and again, but Ye Tian didn't feel any discomfort, after all, his body was too powerful!

"There are a lot of primordial artifacts in the Hanhai Wind Belt, among which there are many primordial artifacts of the sevenfold ancestor peak, and even half-step eightfold primordial ancestor level primordial artifacts! There are even primordial artifacts comparable to the eightfold primordial ancestors, if you don't pay attention, I'm afraid you will die!"

Ye Tian immediately urged a Wind Yuan Dao Ancestor Fu, and his body turned into a wisp of wind and merged into the Hanhai Wind Belt.

In this way, even if it is a wind spirit, it is not easy to find him.

"Compared with other Dao Ancestors, my biggest advantage is that I have a lot of Yuan Dao Ancestor Fu, and now that I have cast this Wind Yuan Dao Ancestor Fu, it can be hidden in the Hanhai Wind Belt, so that my ability to save my life has increased greatly!"

If he didn't have this Yuan Dao Ancestral Endowment, if he wanted to have a big harvest here, he was afraid that he would have to fall countless times.

Time passed slowly, Ye Tian was slowly advancing in the Hanhai Wind Belt, and the Copying Talent was also helping him find the Primordial Antiquities and Wind Spirits.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian's copying talent sensed a primordial artifact, but it frightened him into slowly fleeing immediately.

"It's definitely a primordial artifact comparable to the half-step Eightfold Ancestor level!!"

In his perception, the strength of this primordial artifact was much more powerful than that of Xuanhuang Dao Ancestor.

However, this primordial artifact seemed to be sleeping, and Ye Tian had blended into the wind of the Hanhai Wind Belt, and he was using the Copying Talent to probe, so the other party didn't notice it.

Otherwise, once you notice it, you can directly kill him in the air.

"The Hanhai Wind Belt is really terrifying, no wonder Xuanhuang Daozu listed this place as one of the most dangerous places, and took the Hanhai Wind Belt as the last place to come. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, Xuanhuang Daozu was afraid that he didn't expect that the first thing he came to was the Hanhai Wind Belt.

If Xuanhuang Dao Ancestor knew, even if Ye Tian refined a clone, he would come to stop it.

After all, Dao Ancestor, who has a clone, will die not long after the clone comes here, and he will waste a clone in vain.

......

Along.

Ye Tian found a lot of primordial antiquities, some of which were very weak and even had a lot of value, but he didn't do anything.

Because once you do it, it is very likely that it will be discovered by other powerful primordial artifacts, which will lead to danger.

Moreover, his purpose this time is the wind spirit, and he will only attack the wind spirit, and will not attack other primordial artifacts, so as not to have an accident.

Finally this day.

Ye Tian found the wind spirit.

"The wind spirit is really rare, I have been looking for it for so long before I know it!"

There are a total of six wind spirits here, dancing in the Hanhai Wind Belt.

For other Dao Ancestors, it was like a forbidden place, but for the Wind Spirit, it was a real home, and the environment here had no effect on them.

"Six wind spirits, one sixfold primordial ancestor, three half-step sevenfold primordial ancestors, and two sevenfold primordial ancestors!"

It can be said that the strength of these six wind spirits is not weak, and ordinary sevenfold ancestors would not dare to provoke them.

"Fortunately, these two wind spirits are only the peak of the early stage of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor, and they don't have any life-saving talent, with my strength, it is very simple to instantly kill the peak of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor and the three half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor level wind spirits, but it may not be able to instantly kill the wind spirits of the early stage of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The wind spirit in the early stage of the Sevenfold Ancestor was not weak, although he couldn't beat him, but if he wanted to kill the two of them in seconds, it would be too difficult!

Of course, he can still kill them if he attacks a few more times.

But in this way, time will be delayed, often just a split second, he may be surrounded by a large number of wind spirits, and even attract wind spirits comparable to the peak of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor, and may even attract the wind spirit of the peak of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor of half a step!

The wind spirit at the peak of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor, the speed is not something he can imagine, and he may not really be able to escape when the time comes.

So he had to give up this great temptation!

"Shoot!"

Ye Tian unleashed the Endless Golden Spear, and in an instant, spear shadows pierced through the six wind spirits.

In an instant, the four wind spirits with weaker strength were killed by Ye Tian in seconds, while the two wind spirits at the peak of the early stage of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor were only severely injured and were not killed.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian waved his hand, took away the four wind scales, and then quickly cast the Far Escape of the Small Perfection Realm and fled away at great speed.

Subsequently, he also cast the Elemental Dao Ancestral Fu of the Wind and blended into the wind, thus concealing his body.

Next, Ye Tian left here according to the original route.

"There's no wind spirit chasing me!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

But if you think about it carefully, the wind spirit is the original antiquity, and it has no wisdom, which may cause the appearance of powerful wind spirits at that time, but these wind spirits are not smart enough to hunt him down, and if they can't find him, they will treat it as if nothing happened.

Therefore, he successfully escaped, and also obtained four wind scales, which can be described as a huge gain!
